Who We Are

Real Crews.
Real Quality.

We are not just a company. We are a dedicated crew. At New Cali Construction, we take pride in handling your project with the respect it deserves - whether it is a complete home remodel, a luxury kitchen and bathroom renovation, or a custom ADU conversion.

Serving homeowners in Culver City and the entire Westside. From the first demo day to the final coat of paint our team is on-site, ensuring clear communication and craftsmanship that lasts. No hidden fees and no endless delays - just beautiful results.

Get a Free Estimate See Our Work

Asaf K.

Owner · New Cali Construction Inc.

"We built New Cali Construction on a simple promise: treat every home like our own. Whether it's a kitchen remodel, bathroom renovation, or a full ADU conversion - our crew shows up every day, communicates clearly, and delivers results you'll love for years to come."

“

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

50+ five-star reviews on Yelp. Real homeowners, real results.

“New Cali team performed minor construction work in my Manhattan Beach office. Super easy to work with, very thorough, and mindful of our protocols. I highly recommend New Cali for your next renovation project!”

“I hired New Cali to remodel a half bathroom. Asaf's communication was great — he walked me through the process. They were very flexible and did really high quality work. I was really happy, especially with their stellar communication.”

Marina Del Rey, CA · Feb 2026

“New Cali Construction was incredibly quick, helpful, and professional. They responded quickly, sent someone for a quote right away, and completed the work early! Communication was super easy and we felt informed throughout.”

Playa Vista, CA · Mar 2026

Our Crew In Action

What We Build

Our Services

Bathroom Remodeling

Our bathroom remodeling service is designed to elevate your space with a perfect blend of functionality, comfort, and style.

Read More →

Kitchen Remodeling

Transform your kitchen into the heart of your home with our expert remodeling services, blending style, functionality, and modern design.

Read More →

ADU (Garage Conversion)

Maximize your property's potential with our custom-designed ADUs, providing additional living space, storage, or rental income opportunities.

Read More →

Complete Home Remodel

Achieve your dream home with our complete home remodel and addition services, offering comprehensive solutions for every space.

Read More →

Transparent Pricing

Investment Ranges

Every project gets a detailed, written quote. These ranges help you plan - the exact number depends on your scope, materials, and finishes.

Entry

$15K - $40K

Starting investment range

Refreshes and targeted upgrades that transform a single space without going to the studs.

  • Bathroom refreshes
  • Kitchen cabinet & countertop upgrades
  • Flooring replacement
  • Paint, finish & fixture work
  • Typical timeline: 2-4 weeks
Get a Free Estimate
Most Popular

Signature

$40K - $120K

Most common project range

Full remodels of a high-impact space, with layout changes, structural updates, and premium finishes.

  • Full kitchen remodels
  • Master bath & suite renovations
  • Room additions & conversions
  • Structural & layout changes
  • Typical timeline: 4-10 weeks
Get a Free Estimate

Premium

$120K - $500K+

Full-scale transformation

Complete home transformations, ADUs, and multi-room renovations built as design-build projects.

  • Full home remodels
  • ADU & garage conversions
  • Multi-room renovations
  • Design-build from concept to completion
  • Typical timeline: 3-6 months
Get a Free Estimate

Free estimates always. Every quote is line-item and locked in writing before work begins.

The New Cali Promise

Our Guarantee to You

We built this company for homeowners who've been burned before. Every promise below is in writing.

01

We Show Up Day 1

If we don't show up on the agreed start date, you owe us nothing. No deposit held, no questions asked.

02

Written Scope Before We Touch Anything

Every project starts with a detailed, line-item scope of work - signed by both parties before a single nail is driven.

03

Weekly Photo Updates

You'll never be left wondering what's happening. We send progress photos every week - so you're always in the loop.

04

On-Time, On-Budget - Or We Make It Right

No surprise invoices. No scope creep without your approval. If we go over, that's on us - not you.

Every promise is in writing

Free In-Home Consultation

Let's Build Something Beautiful

No pressure - just honest expertise and a clear plan to bring your vision to life.
